codeReview.summary: The feature correctly implements content extraction for Lectures 1 and 2. The LectureReader component was updated to load from JSON instead of generating fake content. Lecture 1 contains 5 sections (Numbering Systems, Data Representation, 8086 CPU Architecture, Assembly Language Basics, Memory Organization). Lecture 2 contains 4 sections (Register Overview, MOV Instruction, Memory Addressing Modes, Data Transfer Examples). Syntax highlighting is implemented with registers in blue, instructions in purple, numbers in amber. Section navigation and mark-as-read functionality work correctly. Build and lint pass.

issues.description: The commit modifies services.yaml to add Mission: UI Fixes section. This change is unrelated to the extract-lecture-1-2 feature and should have been in a separate commit.

The commit adds ui-fixes scrutiny review JSON files (fix-theme-toggle.json, merge-course-map-lectures.json, remove-settings-nav.json) which belong to a different milestone (ui-fixes) than this feature (content-extraction).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The commit d3161da contains changes from multiple unrelated features: (1) lecture extraction content, (2) UI fixes mission update to services.yaml, (3) UI fixes scrutiny reviews. AGENTS.md commit style says to prefer small PRs and milestone commits, but this commit violates that by mixing features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git diff e58fd31..d3161da shows services.yaml was modified with ui-fixes content, and ui-fixes scrutiny review files were added. The commit message only mentions lecture extraction.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There are duplicate lectures.json files in data/processed/ (146KB, 10 lectures) and src/data/processed/ (84KB, 6 lectures). The LectureReader imports from @/data/processed/ which resolves to src/data/processed/, so only 6 lectures are available at runtime. This duplication could cause confusion about which file is authoritative.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: LectureReader.tsx imports from @/data/processed/lectures.json which resolves to src/data/processed/lectures.json with 6 lectures. data/processed/lectures.json has 10 lectures.

summary: Code review passes. The feature correctly extracts content for Lectures 1 and 2 with proper structure, provenance metadata, syntax highlighting, and section navigation. Build and lint pass. The VAL-LECT-001 requirement for all 10 lectures is not met, but this was explicitly scoped to Lectures 1-2 only and acknowledged as non-blocking. Two non-blocking issues: (1) the commit contains unrelated changes (ui-fixes mission and scrutiny reviews), and (2) duplicate lectures.json files exist in two directories with different content sets.
